---
title: "Anna Georgina Macaulay"
---

## Anna Georgina Macaulay

### Description

neighbour, known as \'Nina\'

### Biography

She was probably Anna Georgina Macaulay (b.Antrim 1835), daughter of Anna (Hyndman) Macaulay (Belfast 1801- Winchester 1891), widow of Frederick William Macaulay.  The mother is found living in Winchester with another spinster daughter, Rebecca (1828-1912) in the 1881 and 1891 censuses. [[J.J.Howard and F. A. Crisp, <i>Visitation of Ireland</i>, 118]

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 15th 1887
- Letter from June 2d 1883

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
